description: Full website redesign: 6 passes transforming dashboard UI into warm, human-first experience
changes: web/app/globals.css — amber-gold palette, ambient glow backgrounds, fadeInUp/warmPulse/hover-lift animations
web/app/page.tsx — 6-section landing page with graceful empty states
web/app/ideas/page.tsx — warm gradient cards, confidence bars, hover-lift
web/app/today/page.tsx — warm stat cards, friendly empty states
web/app/demo/page.tsx — consistent gradient styling and softer borders
web/app/tasks/page.tsx — warm hero card, gradient stat cards, pill nav links
web/app/specs/page.tsx — warm hero, removed breadcrumbs, gradient sections
web/app/flow/page.tsx — warm hero, pill badges, friendly empty states
web/app/portfolio/page.tsx — warm hero card, friendly copy, gradient stats
web/app/contributors/page.tsx — warm hero card, user-friendly descriptions
web/app/error.tsx — contextual error messaging, fetch-aware help text
web/components/site_header.tsx — simplified nav (17→4), ambient heartbeat dot
web/components/page_context_links.tsx — subtler context bar, cleaner breadcrumbs
docs/WORKBOOK.md — session log, 10 inspiring future ideas (I1-I10)
test_impact: No API test changes; web-only visual redesign across all 12 page files
